LONG NAME: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_SCRNG_CMPST_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = No issues with pests, mold, lead, heat, oven, smoke detectors, or water 
1 = Has issues with pests, mold, lead, heat, oven, smoke detectors, and/or water 
Missing 

COMMENT: Variables considered for this indicator are the seven fields that begin with “SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_*”. 
These are: SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_HEAT_SW, SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_LEAD_SW, 
SR_CORE_HOUSNG_2_MOLD_SW,
